# Leituras — Translated Podcasts & Videos / Podcasts & Vídeos Traduzidos

> Bilingual site (PT-BR + English) with articles from podcasts and videos about AI, tech and finance.
> Each article is a full transcript organized into thematic sections.
> Source: YouTube and Twitter/X videos.

## Articles — Português (PT-BR)

- [Chefe do Claude Code: O Que Acontece Depois Que a Programação For Resolvida](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/chefe-do-claude-code-o-que-acontece-depois-que-a-programacao-for-resolvida.html)
  Fonte: Lenny's Podcast com Boris Cherny (Chefe do Claude Code, Anthropic)

- [Guia Completo do Claude — De Iniciante a Sistema Operacional de IA](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/guia-completo-claude-iniciante-sistema-operacional-ia.html)
  Fonte: 51bodila · Twitter/X

- [Claude Code Leak: What We've Learned So Far](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/claude-code-leak-what-weve-learned-so-far.html)
  Fonte: Goju Tech Talk

- [Como Construí um Sistema de Suporte ao Cliente com IA de Nível Produção](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/como-construi-sistema-suporte-cliente-ia-nivel-producao.html)
  Fonte: Usando Claude Code — Tutorial prático

- [De IDEs para Agentes de IA](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/de-ides-para-agentes-de-ia-steve-yegge.html)
  Fonte: Steve Yegge — Sourcegraph Podcast

- [Do Prompt à Produção: O Que É Engenharia Agêntica?](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/do-prompt-a-producao-o-que-e-engenharia-agentica.html)
  Fonte: Live — Engenharia Agêntica na Prática

- [Engenharia Agêntica: Contexto, Guardrails e Criatividade](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/engenharia-agentica-contexto-guardrails-e-criatividade.html)
  Fonte: Palestra técnica sobre Engenharia Agêntica

- [Engenheiro Sênior Demonstra Fluxo de Desenvolvimento com Especificações de IA](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/engenheiro-senior-fluxo-desenvolvimento-especificacoes-ia.html)
  Fonte: Live — Desenvolvimento Guiado por Especificação com IA

- [O Estado da Arte da IA em 2026](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/estado-da-ia-2026-ponto-de-inflexao-simon-willison.html)
  Fonte: Passamos o Ponto de Inflexão e as &ldquo;Fábricas Escuras&rdquo; Estão Chegando

- [Fluxos de Trabalho Agênticos com Don Syme](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/fluxos-de-trabalho-agenticos-don-syme.html)
  Fonte: Don Syme — Criador do F# sobre Agentes de IA

- [Política Corporativa em Tech — Tudo Que Ninguém Te Conta](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/politica-corporativa-tech-tudo-que-ninguem-te-conta.html)
  Fonte: Ethan Evans (ex-VP Amazon) · Ryan Peterman

- [Práticas de Engenharia que Fazem os Agentes de Código Funcionar](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/praticas-de-engenharia-para-agentes-de-codigo-simon-willison.html)
  Fonte: Simon Willison — The Pragmatic Engineer Podcast

- [Roteiro do Engenheiro de IA para Desenvolvedores de Software](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/roteiro-engenheiro-ia-para-desenvolvedores-de-software.html)
  Fonte: Guia de carreira — AI Engineering Roadmap

- [Um Agente Não É Suficiente: Programação Agêntica Além do Claude Code](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/um-agente-nao-e-suficiente-programacao-agentica-alem-do-claude-code.html)
  Fonte: Vídeo técnico — Multi-agent Coding

- [Obsidian + Claude Code: Pensamento Amplificado](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/obsidian-claude-code-pensamento.html)
  Fonte: @heyamit_ (com Vin)

- [Conselhos de Carreira em IA — Andrew Ng e Lawrence Moroney na Stanford](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/conselhos-de-carreira-em-ia-andrew-ng-lawrence-moroney-stanford.html)
  Fonte: Andrew Ng & Lawrence Moroney · Stanford CS230

- [Entendendo Rony Coder](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/entendendo-rony-coder.html)
  Fonte: @ronycoder

- [Finanças Comportamentais — Robert Shiller na Yale](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/financas-comportamentais-robert-shiller-yale.html)
  Fonte: Robert Shiller · Yale Open Courses

- [IA Agêntica: Progressão do Uso de Modelos de Linguagem](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/ia-agentica-progressao-uso-modelos-linguagem-stanford.html)
  Fonte: Inseo Bong · Stanford Online

- [Por Que Paramos de Construir Agentes e Começamos a Construir Skills](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/por-que-paramos-de-construir-agentes-e-comecamos-a-construir-skills.html)
  Fonte: Barry Zhang & Mahesh Sathiamoorthy · Anthropic

- [Trading com Order Flow — Do Mercado Global ao Chinês](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/trading-com-order-flow-mercado-global-ao-chines.html)
  Fonte: Trader Chinês · Twitter/X

- [Akita: IA, prompt e o fim do programador bracal](https://adhenawer.net/posts/pt_br/akita-ia-prompt-fim-programador-bracal.html)
  Fonte: Fabio Akita · Flow Podcast #588

## Blog — Português

- [Rodando este projeto no dia a dia dentro do Claude Code](https://adhenawer.net/blog/claude-code-daily-workflow.html)
  Como é, na prática, rodar o video-to-text no dia a dia dentro do Claude Code: os prompts, os subprocessos, por que o CLAUDE.md é load-bearing e onde os subagents compensam.

- [Markdown para Agentes no plano gratuito do Cloudflare Workers](https://adhenawer.net/blog/markdown-for-agents-free-tier.html)
  Como replicar o recurso pago Markdown for Agents da Cloudflare com um Worker no plano gratuito: content negotiation, conversão de HTML para Markdown com regex e redução de 75% de tokens para crawlers de LLMs.

- [Transformando podcasts de horas em artigos que dá pra ler](https://adhenawer.net/blog/transformando-podcasts-em-artigos-bilingues.html)
  Um pipeline bilíngue que transforma vídeos do YouTube e Twitter/X em artigos estáticos — Whisper local, Claude para organização e tradução, HTML puro, Cloudflare Worker grátis servindo Markdown para agentes.

## Blog — English

- [Running this project daily inside Claude Code](https://adhenawer.net/blog/en/claude-code-daily-workflow.html)
  What it actually looks like to run video-to-text day-to-day inside Claude Code: the prompts, the subprocesses, why CLAUDE.md is load-bearing, and where subagents pay off.

- [Markdown for Agents on Free Tier Cloudflare Workers](https://adhenawer.net/blog/en/markdown-for-agents-free-tier.html)
  How to replicate Cloudflare's paid Markdown for Agents feature with a free-tier Worker: content negotiation, regex-based HTML to Markdown, and a 75% token reduction for LLM crawlers.

- [Turning hours-long podcasts into articles you can actually read](https://adhenawer.net/blog/en/turning-podcasts-into-readable-articles.html)
  A bilingual pipeline that turns YouTube and Twitter/X videos into static articles — local Whisper, Claude for structure and translation, plain HTML, and a free Cloudflare Worker serving Markdown to agents.

## Articles — English

- [The Head of Claude Code on What Happens After Coding Is Solved](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/head-claude-code-happens-after-coding-solved.html)
  Source: Lenny's Podcast with Boris Cherny (Head of Claude Code, Anthropic)

- [The Complete Claude Guide — From Beginner to AI Operating System](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/complete-claude-guide-beginner-ai-operating-system.html)
  Source: 51bodila · Twitter/X

- [Claude Code Leak: What We Have Learned So Far](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/claude-code-leak-we-have-learned-so-far.html)
  Source: Goju Tech Talk

- [How I Built a Production-Grade AI Customer Support System](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/how-i-built-production-grade-ai-customer-support-system.html)
  Source: Using Claude Code — A Hands-On Tutorial

- [From IDEs to AI Agents](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/ides-ai-agents.html)
  Source: Steve Yegge — The Pragmatic Engineer Podcast

- [From Prompt to Production: What Is Agentic Engineering?](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/prompt-production-agentic-engineering.html)
  Source: Live — Agentic Engineering in Practice

- [Agentic Engineering: Context, Guardrails, and Creativity](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/agentic-engineering-context-guardrails-creativity.html)
  Source: Port Webinar — Tomas & Zach on taming agentic chaos

- [A Senior Engineer Demonstrates a Spec-Driven AI Development Flow](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/senior-engineer-demonstrates-spec-driven-ai-development-flow.html)
  Source: Live — Spec-Driven Development with AI (Sam Breed, Augment Intent)

- [The State of AI in 2026](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/state-ai-2026.html)
  Source: We Crossed the Inflection Point and the Dark Factories Are Coming

- [Agentic Workflows with Don Syme](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/agentic-workflows-don-syme.html)
  Source: Don Syme — Creator of F# on AI Agents

- [Corporate Politics in Tech: Everything Nobody Tells You](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/corporate-politics-tech-everything-nobody-tells.html)
  Source: Ethan Evans (former Amazon VP) · Ryan Peterman

- [Engineering Practices That Make Coding Agents Work](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/engineering-practices-make-coding-agents-work.html)
  Source: Simon Willison — The Pragmatic Engineer Podcast

- [The AI Engineer Roadmap for Software Developers](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/ai-engineer-roadmap-software-developers.html)
  Source: Dhaval Patel — Codebasics / Atliq Technologies

- [One Agent Is Not Enough: Multi-Team Agentic Coding Beyond Claude Code](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/one-agent-not-enough-multi-team-agentic-coding-beyond-claude-code.html)
  Source: Technical video — Multi-agent Coding

- [Obsidian + Claude Code: Your Second Brain, Amplified](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/obsidian-claude-code-second-brain-amplified.html)
  Source: @heyamit_ (with Vin)

- [AI Career Advice — Andrew Ng and Lawrence Moroney at Stanford](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/ai-career-advice-andrew-ng-lawrence-moroney-stanford.html)
  Source: Andrew Ng & Lawrence Moroney · Stanford CS230

- [How to Speak: Patrick Winston on Giving Talks That Matter](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/how-speak-patrick-winston-giving-talks-matter.html)
  Source: Patrick Winston · MIT Lecture (shared by @ronycoder)

- [Behavioral Finance: Psychology, Manipulation, and Integrity in Markets](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/behavioral-finance-psychology-manipulation-integrity-markets.html)
  Source: Robert Shiller · Yale Open Courses

- [Agentic AI: The Progression of Language Model Usage](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/agentic-ai-progression-language-model-usage.html)
  Source: Inseo Bong · Stanford Online

- [Why We Stopped Building Agents and Started Building Skills](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/why-we-stopped-building-agents-started-building-skills.html)
  Source: Barry Zhang & Mahesh Sathiamoorthy · Anthropic

- [Akita: AI, Prompts and the End of Grunt-Work Programming](https://adhenawer.net/posts/original/akita-ai-prompts-end-of-grunt-work-programming.html)
  Source: Fabio Akita · Flow Podcast #588
